# Phase-02 — Distributed Systems Deep Dive

> Master the theory and practice that underpins every scalable data platform.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 7-10**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Consensus and Coordination](01_Consensus_and_Coordination.prompt.md) | `Consensus_and_Coordination.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 02 | [Replication and Consistency](02_Replication_and_Consistency.prompt.md) | `Replication_and_Consistency.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 03 | [Partitioning and Sharding](03_Partitioning_and_Sharding.prompt.md) | `Partitioning_and_Sharding.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [CAP and PACELC](04_CAP_and_PACELC.prompt.md) | `CAP_and_PACELC.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 05 | [Distributed Transactions](05_Distributed_Transactions.prompt.md) | `Distributed_Transactions.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 06 | [Time, Clocks and Ordering](06_Time_Clocks_and_Ordering.prompt.md) | `Time_Clocks_and_Ordering.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 07 | [Fault Tolerance and Resilience](07_Fault_Tolerance_and_Resilience.prompt.md) | `Fault_Tolerance_and_Resilience.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 08 | [Distributed Systems Case Studies](08_Distributed_Systems_Case_Studies.prompt.md) | `Distributed_Systems_Case_Studies.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
